title: Pixel to CM Converter - Screen Measurement Tool
description: Free pixel to centimeter converter. Convert pixels to cm and vice versa based on screen DPI/PPI for accurate print and display measurements.
keywords: pixel to cm converter, px to cm, pixels to centimeters, screen measurement, DPI converter
intro: Convert between pixels and centimeters based on your screen's DPI (dots per inch). Essential for print design and accurate measurements.

faq.q: How many pixels are in 1 cm?
faq.a: At 96 DPI (standard screen), 1 cm ≈ 37.8 pixels. At 300 DPI (print), 1 cm ≈ 118.1 pixels. It depends on resolution.
Use 96 DPI for standard screens, 72 DPI for Mac displays, and 300 DPI for print materials.
DPI determines how many pixels fit in a physical inch. Higher DPI means more pixels per inch, resulting in sharper images.
